final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still simulating a TikTok (Douyin) live stream screenshot featuring a young woman resembling a celestial beauty (神仙姐姐).

Style/medium: screenshot UI mockup of a Douyin live stream
Composition: vertical 9:16 framing, subject holding a sign facing the camera
Subject: 神仙姐姐 — a beautiful young woman holding a handwritten sign
Scene/backdrop: Douyin live stream interface with on-screen UI overlays (viewer count, comments, like animations)
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: sign text must read exactly "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"; include typical Douyin live stream UI elements
Avoid:
